methods.description: Process for collecting fossil fish bones from the Pocşeşti site using screen-washing techniques.

steps.description: Collection of fossil fishes from Pocşeşti was obtained by the screen-washing (mesh diameter = 1.0 mm) of the bonyferous rock from the 6th layer.
steps.searchable_summary: collect fossil fish bones using screen-washing with 1.0 mm mesh

methods.description: Direct determination of fossil remnants using diagnostic features and comparison with osteological collections.

steps.description: A direct determination of fossil remnants was provided by authors using diagnostic features.
steps.searchable_summary: determine fossil remnants using diagnostic features

steps.description: For comparative purposes bones from the osteological collections of the National Museum of Natural History NAS of Ukraine were used.
steps.searchable_summary: compare fossil bones with osteological collections

methods.description: Measurement of fossil remnants using digital calipers and photographing them for documentation.

steps.description: Measurements were taken with digital caliper, with accuracy to 0.1 mm.
steps.searchable_summary: measure fossil remnants with digital caliper
